name: Edward Elgar
abstract: Sir Edward William Elgar, 1st Baronet ( ; 2 June 1857 – 23 February 1934) was an English composer, many of whose works have entered the British and international classical concert repertoire. Among his best-known compositions are orchestral works including the Enigma Variations, the Pomp and Circumstance Marches, concertos for violin and…

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Watrous
about_quotes.evidence: It actually comes off sounding a little like Edward Elgar... I listen to — right now I’m delving into Sir Edward Elgar right now
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Watrous interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, March 26, 1999
